config.Jewelry.Variants.description: When enabled, each jewelry is a separate item with its own texture, making progression harder.

config.Jewelry.UnlockMethod.description: How the Gem Tumbler and Lapidary Bench is unlocked. Skill = At Mining Level 3 and 6, respectively. Lazy = Unlocked by default.

RAR.TransmutationTable.name: Transmutation Table
RAR.TransmutationTable.description: Turns mineral into useful resources. Needs solar or void essence to turn them into something else.
RAR.GemTumbler.name: Gem Tumbler
RAR.LapidaryBench.name: Lapidary Bench
RAR.LapidaryBench.description: Right click with a pickaxe to turn it into another variant.
RAR.Gneiss.name: Gneiss
RAR.Gneiss.description: Formed by heat and pressure into layers of minerals.
RAR.Halite.name: Halite
RAR.Hornblende.name: Hornblende
RAR.Hornblende.description: Tough black mineral from deep underground.
RAR.LapisLazuli.name: Lapis Lazuli
RAR.LapisLazuli.description: Vivid blue gem dotted with gold flecks.
RAR.Olivine.name: Olivine
RAR.Olivine.description: A green crystal with volcanic origins.
RAR.Onyx.name: Onyx
RAR.Onyx.description: Said to offer protection and strength.
RAR.Peridot.name: Peridot
RAR.PrismaticPieces.name: Prismatic Pieces
RAR.PrismaticPieces.description: Could be smelted into something very powerful.
RAR.Rhodochrosite.name: Rhodochrosite
RAR.Rhodochrosite.description: A manganese mineral with rosy hue, often found in old mines.
RAR.Sapphire.name: Sapphire
RAR.Sapphire.description: A shimmering blue gem rumored to bring good fortune.
RAR.Schist.name: Schist
RAR.Schist.description: Has flaky layers shaped by intense heat and pressure.
RAR.Sunstone.name: Sunstone
RAR.Sunstone.description: Looking at it makes you feel all warm and happy.
RAR.Vanadinite.name: Vanadinite
RAR.Vanadinite.description: A beautiful, bright red crystal said to boost energy.
RAR.Zircon.name: Zircon
RAR.Zircon.description: Sought after by adventurers for its cool red glow.
RAR.PolishedLapisLazuli.name: Polished Lapis Lazuli
RAR.PolishedLapisLazuli.description: Slick and shiny, ready to amp up your style.
RAR.PolishedOnyx.name: Polished Onyx
RAR.PolishedOnyx.description: So glossy it's basically a mirror.
RAR.PolishedPeridot.name: Polished Peridot
RAR.PolishedRhodochrosite.name: Polished Rhodochrosite
RAR.PolishedRhodochrosite.description: With a shine highlighting its striking bands.
RAR.PolishedSapphire.name: Polished Sapphire
RAR.PolishedSapphire.description: Diffracts rays when looked at under the sun.
RAR.PolishedSunstone.name: Polished Sunstone
RAR.PolishedSunstone.description: Shiny enough to catch and reflect every ray of sunlight.
RAR.PolishedVanadinite.name: Polished Vanadinite
RAR.PolishedZircon.name: Polished Zircon
RAR.PolishedMalachite.name: Polished Malachite
RAR.PolishedMalachite.description: Green swirls that almost look alive.
RAR.PolishedTigerseye.name: Polished Tigerseye
RAR.PolishedTigerseye.description: Golden stripes that catch the light just right.
RAR.PolishedFireOpal.name: Polished Fire Opal
RAR.PolishedFireOpal.description: Glows like it's holding a little flame inside.
RAR.Gem.Polished.name: Polished Gem
RAR.Gem.Polished.description: A polished gem, useful for crafting jewels.

RAR.Base.description: Shaped gold mount for gem setting. Doesn't sell much on its own.
RAR.Base.missing: Needs 1 Gold Bar or Gold Mount.
RAR.Wizard.Transmute.1: Ah, young farmer. You arrive at just the right moment.
RAR.Wizard.Transmute.2: I have been trying to transmute some materials.#$b#...but it is no longer working.#$b#This troubles me... my old Transmutation Table has lain dormant for years and its workings have grown fragile.
RAR.Wizard.Transmute.3: A Transmutation Table can change any item into something else. #$b#Help me rebuild it, and I will teach you how to craft one.
RAR.Wizard.Transmute.Q: The parts needed are 40 Wood, 10 Fiber, 2 Gold Bars, and a Torch. I have some already, but not all.
RAR.Wizard.Transmute.4: Very well. I shall await your return.
RAR.Wizard.Mutstrane.1: Good to see you farmer. #$b#I see, you have returned with your share.
RAR.Wizard.Mutstrane.2: Now, watch. #$b#To you use, place your materials on the table and let the runes do their work.
RAR.Wizard.Mutstrane.3: If you wish to reverse the process, an essence can guide the magic backward. #$b#It will work, though the result is never quite as refined as the first.
RAR.Wizard.Mutstrane.4: Take it. I have restored the table, but I cannot attend to it constantly.
RAR.Wizard.Mutstrane.5: The table is yours, and with it, the knowledge to craft more. Use it wisely
RAR.Wizard.Mutstrane.6: Learned how to craft a 'Transmutation Table'
RAR.Transmute.title: Transmutation
RAR.Transmute.hint: Bring the needed material so he can restore it and teach you how to make one.
RAR.Transmute.Hard: Bring a Gold Bar to the Wizard's Tower.
RAR.Transmute.Easy: Bring a Torch to the Wizard's Tower.
Frosbite Cleaver.D: A hatchet forged in the heart of winter.
Flare Halberd.D: A polearm forged in the heart of a volcano.
Oathkeeper.D: Its strikes heal the worthy and smite the wicked with righteous fury.
Pestilence.D: A weapon dripping with vile miasma.
Brinebreaker Maul.D: This formidable hammer shatters foes with crushing force of salty vengeance.
